query:
-- Look for matched services at the Burleigh Waters address (182 Acanthus Ave)
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.supplierName, s.customerName, s.customerExternalId, s.locationAddress, s.connectionId
FROM services s
WHERE s.locationAddress LIKE '%ACANTHUS%' OR s.locationAddress LIKE '%Acanthus%'
   OR s.locationAddress LIKE '%NEPEAN%' OR s.locationAddress LIKE '%Nepean%'
   OR s.connectionId IN ('AVC400059428243', 'AVC000239687132')
LIMIT 20;
